# Implement Smart Conflict Detection

## Description
The AI agent should be able to detect and warn about scheduling conflicts when creating or modifying events. This includes checking for overlapping events, travel time between locations, and family member availability.

## Use Case
When a user says "Schedule a dentist appointment tomorrow at 2pm", the AI should:
1. Check for existing events at that time
2. Verify family member availability
3. Consider travel time if location is specified
4. Suggest alternative times if conflicts are found

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Detect overlapping events for the same family member
- [ ] Check family member availability across all events
- [ ] Consider travel time between different locations
- [ ] Provide conflict warnings with alternative suggestions
- [ ] Handle recurring event conflicts
- [ ] Support for "tentative" events during conflict resolution
- [ ] Integration with calendar view to highlight conflicts

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement conflict detection algorithm
- [ ] Add travel time calculation (Google Maps API integration)
- [ ] Update AI tools to include conflict checking
- [ ] Modify event creation to include conflict validation
- [ ] Add conflict resolution UI in chat interface

## Implementation Notes
- Use Google Maps API for travel time calculations
- Store location data for events to enable travel time checks
- Consider timezone differences for family members in different locations
- Implement conflict severity levels (warning vs blocking)
